title: Quilt Loading Screen
description: A loading screen based off of The Quilt Community's server banner.
body:
## Screenshots in the Gallery tab above!

**Requires [Quilt Loader](https://quiltmc.org) and [QSL](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl).**

This is a loading screen based off of [The Quilt Community's (former) server banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/QuiltMC/art/master/banners/png/quilt-banner.png).

### Not sure what Quilt is? Check it out! --> https://quiltmc.org

The mod consists of several patches from the Quilt logo falling like snow, which then rapidly fall off the screen once loading ends.

This also applies with the F3-T resource pack reload.

Every June, Quilt Loading Screen turns on Pride Mode and the patches consist of pride flags instead! You can also turn this on manually all the time via a config option if you have Mod Menu installed.

<details><summary>简体</summary>

## 截图在上面的 "Gallery"(图库)标签中!

**需要[Quilt Loader](https://quiltmc.org)和[QSL](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl)。**

这是一个基于[The Quilt Community（前）服务器横幅的加载画面](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/QuiltMC/art/master/banners/png/quilt-banner.png)。

### 不知道Quilt是什么？看看吧! --> https://quiltmc.org

该模型由Quilt标志的几个补丁组成，像雪一样落下，然后在加载结束后迅速从屏幕上掉下来。

这也适用于F3-T资源包的重新加载。

每年六月，Quilt加载屏幕都会开启骄傲模式，补丁由骄傲的旗帜组成! 如果你安装了Mod Menu，你也可以通过一个配置选项手动一直打开它。

任何人都可以把我的mods上传到[mcmod.cn](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/6628.html)。我不会说中文，所以我不能自己做这个! 如果你想了解更多信息，请发邮件给我 emmaffle@modrinth.com。

</details>
